title: Contractual practice in the UK combinable crops sector
body: "The Department for Environment, Food and Rural Affairs (Defra) wants to know what you think about:    how the combinable crops sector currently works  the nature of relationships in the supply chain  whether the functioning of the combinable crops supply chain can be improved, and how    This consultation will inform our understanding of issues concerning fairness and transparency within the sector. Your responses will help us to design future policy aimed at promoting better business practice and making the supply chain fairer for all.   You can also view a Welsh language version of this consultation.  "
